def select_action(obs: np.ndarray) -> int:
    """Select a Pong action from the 128-byte RAM state.

    The player controls the right paddle. A point is scored each time
    the ball passes the opponent's paddle; a point is lost when the
    ball passes the player's own paddle.

    Args:
        obs: 128-element uint8 array (ALE RAM).
            obs[49]: ball x  (17-160, left to right)
            obs[54]: ball y  (17-194, larger = lower on screen)
            obs[51]: player (right) paddle y center (34-194)
            obs[50]: CPU (left) paddle y center     (34-194)
    Returns:
        action: 0 (NOOP), 2 (UP), or 3 (DOWN)
    """
    ball_x = obs[49]
    ball_y = obs[54]
    paddle_y = obs[51]
    
    # Estimate vertical speed based on ball position (simple heuristic)
    if ball_y < 80:
        vert_vel = -3
    elif ball_y > 130:
        vert_vel = 3
    else:
        vert_vel = 0
    
    # Predict ball y when it reaches x=160 (right paddle)
    dist = 160 - ball_x
    if dist > 0:
        frames = max(1, dist // 4)
        target = ball_y + vert_vel * frames
        
        # Reflect off top (17) and bottom (194)
        WALL_TOP = 17
        WALL_BOTTOM = 194
        if target < WALL_TOP:
            target = WALL_TOP + (WALL_TOP - target)
        elif target > WALL_BOTTOM:
            target = WALL_BOTTOM - (target - WALL_BOTTOM)
        # Clamp to valid paddle range
        target = max(34, min(194, target))
    else:
        target = ball_y
    
    # Dynamic dead zone: smaller when ball is closer
    dead_zone = max(4, min(12, dist // 8)) if dist > 0 else 8
    
    # Proportional movement with dead zone
    diff = target - paddle_y
    if diff < -dead_zone:
        return 2  # UP
    elif diff > dead_zone:
        return 3  # DOWN
    return 0  # NOOP

    """Select a Pong action from the 128-byte RAM state.

    The player controls the right paddle. A point is scored each time
    the ball passes the opponent's paddle; a point is lost when the
    ball passes the player's own paddle.

    Args:

            obs[49]: ball x  (17-160, left to right)
            obs[54]: ball y  (17-194, larger = lower on screen)

            obs[50]: CPU (left) paddle y center     (34-194)
    Returns:
        action: 0 (NOOP), 2 (UP), or 3 (DOWN)

    if not hasattr(select_action, "tick"):
        select_action.tick = 0
        select_action.prev_ball_y = obs[54]

    select_action.tick = (select_action.tick + 1) % 8
    
    if phase < 4:

    else:
        return 3

def select_action(obs: np.ndarray) -> int:
    """Select a Pong action from the 128-byte RAM state.

    The player controls the right paddle. A point is scored each time
    the ball passes the opponent's paddle; a point is lost when the
    ball passes the player's own paddle.

    Args:
        obs: 128-element uint8 array (ALE RAM).
            obs[49]: ball x  (17-160, left to right)
            obs[54]: ball y  (17-194, larger = lower on screen)
            obs[51]: player (right) paddle y center (34-194)
            obs[50]: CPU (left) paddle y center     (34-194)
    Returns:
        action: 0 (NOOP), 2 (UP), or 3 (DOWN)
    """
    ball_x = obs[49]
    ball_y = obs[54]
    paddle_y = obs[51]
    paddle_center = paddle_y + 10

    # Store previous ball positions for velocity
    if not hasattr(select_action, "prev_ball_y"):
        select_action.prev_ball_y = ball_y
    if not hasattr(select_action, "prev_ball_x"):
        select_action.prev_ball_x = ball_x
    if not hasattr(select_action, "integral"):
        select_action.integral = 0
    if not hasattr(select_action, "safe_y"):
        select_action.safe_y = 105  # center

    dy = ball_y - select_action.prev_ball_y
    dx = ball_x - select_action.prev_ball_x
    select_action.prev_ball_y = ball_y
    select_action.prev_ball_x = ball_x

    # If ball moving toward right paddle, compute predicted arrival y
    if dx > 0 and ball_x < 160:
        dist = 160 - ball_x
        frames = max(1, dist // 4) if dx > 0 else 1
        predicted_y = ball_y + dy * frames
        # Clamp with bouncing

            predicted_y = 34 - (17 - predicted_y)
        if predicted_y > 194:
            predicted_y = 194 - (predicted_y - 194)
        predicted_y = max(34, min(194, predicted_y))
        target = predicted_y
        select_action.safe_y = predicted_y  # update safe zone
    else:
        # Return to stored safe zone
        target = select_action.safe_y

    error = target - paddle_center

    # PID with integral windup protection
    Kp = 0.5
    Ki = 0.02
    Kd = 0.1
    derivative = dy  # rate of ball y change

    # Proportional term
    p_term = Kp * error
    # Integral term (with windup clamp)
    select_action.integral += error
    select_action.integral = max(-30, min(30, select_action.integral))
    i_term = Ki * select_action.integral
    # Derivative term

    output = p_term + i_term + d_term
    dead_zone = 3
    if output < -dead_zone:
        return 2  # UP
    elif output > dead_zone:
        return 3  # DOWN
    return 0

def select_action(obs: np.ndarray) -> int:
    """Select a Pong action from the 128-byte RAM state.

    The player controls the right paddle. A point is scored each time
    the ball passes the opponent's paddle; a point is lost when the
    ball passes the player's own paddle.

    Args:
        obs: 128-element uint8 array (ALE RAM).
            obs[49]: ball x  (17-160, left to right)
            obs[54]: ball y  (17-194, larger = lower on screen)
            obs[51]: player (right) paddle y center (34-194)
            obs[50]: CPU (left) paddle y center     (34-194)
    Returns:
        action: 0 (NOOP), 2 (UP), or 3 (DOWN)
    """
    # Tabular Q-learning with fixed parameters
    if not hasattr(select_action, "q_table"):
        select_action.q_table = {}
        select_action.lr = 0.1
        select_action.discount = 0.9
        select_action.epsilon = 0.1
        select_action.prev_ball_y = obs[54]
        select_action.prev_paddle_y = obs[51]
        select_action.prev_action = 0
        select_action.prev_state = None

    ball_y = obs[54]
    paddle_y = obs[51]

    # Discretize state: ball_y(0-7) and paddle_y(0-7)
    def discretize(by, py):
        by_bin = int((by - 17) / 22)  # 0..7
        py_bin = int((py - 34) / 20)  # 0..7
        by_bin = max(0, min(7, by_bin))
        py_bin = max(0, min(7, py_bin))
        return (by_bin, py_bin)

    state = discretize(ball_y, paddle_y)

    # Update Q-table from previous transition
    if select_action.prev_state is not None:
        prev_s = select_action.prev_state
        prev_a = select_action.prev_action
        reward = 0
        # Simple reward: if ball_y moved toward paddle, positive; away, negative
        if abs(ball_y - paddle_y) < abs(select_action.prev_ball_y - select_action.prev_paddle_y):
            reward = 1
        elif abs(ball_y - paddle_y) > abs(select_action.prev_ball_y - select_action.prev_paddle_y):
            reward = -1

        if prev_s not in select_action.q_table:
            select_action.q_table[prev_s] = [0.0, 0.0, 0.0]
        if state not in select_action.q_table:
            select_action.q_table[state] = [0.0, 0.0, 0.0]

        max_future_q = max(select_action.q_table[state])
        old_q = select_action.q_table[prev_s][prev_a]
        select_action.q_table[prev_s][prev_a] = old_q + select_action.lr * (
            reward + select_action.discount * max_future_q - old_q
        )

    # Store current state for next update
    select_action.prev_state = state
    select_action.prev_ball_y = ball_y
    select_action.prev_paddle_y = paddle_y

    # Epsilon-greedy action selection
    if np.random.random() < select_action.epsilon:
        action = np.random.choice([0, 2, 3])
    else:
        if state not in select_action.q_table:
            select_action.q_table[state] = [0.0, 0.0, 0.0]
        q_vals = select_action.q_table[state]
        best_action = np.argmax(q_vals)
        action = [0, 2, 3][best_action]

    select_action.prev_action = [0, 2, 3].index(action)
    return action

def select_action(obs: np.ndarray) -> int:
    # Discretize state: ball_x region, ball_y quantized, paddle_y quantized
    ball_x = obs[49]
    ball_y = obs[54]
    paddle_y = obs[51]
    
    # Simple ball direction heuristic (rightward = 1, leftward = 0)
    ball_dir = 1 if ball_x > 80 else 0
    
    # Quantize positions into 16 buckets each
    bx_bucket = min(15, ball_x // 10)
    by_bucket = min(15, ball_y // 12)
    py_bucket = min(15, paddle_y // 12)
    
    state_key = (bx_bucket, by_bucket, py_bucket, ball_dir)
    
    # Initialize Q-table if not exists
    if not hasattr(select_action, "q_table"):
        select_action.q_table = {}
        select_action.prev_state = None
        select_action.prev_action = None
    
    # Exploration rate and learning rate
    epsilon = 0.05
    alpha = 0.5
    gamma = 0.9
    
    # Current Q-values for this state
    if state_key not in select_action.q_table:
        select_action.q_table[state_key] = [0, 0, 0]  # NOOP, UP, DOWN
    
    # Update previous transition if we have one
    if select_action.prev_state is not None:
        prev_q = select_action.q_table[select_action.prev_state][select_action.prev_action]
        # Compute reward: +1 if ball_x > 150 (near paddle), else 0
        reward = 1.0 if ball_x > 150 else 0.0
        max_next_q = max(select_action.q_table[state_key])
        new_q = prev_q + alpha * (reward + gamma * max_next_q - prev_q)
        select_action.q_table[select_action.prev_state][select_action.prev_action] = new_q
    
    # Epsilon-greedy action selection
    if np.random.random() < epsilon:
        action = np.random.choice([0, 2, 3])
    else:
        q_vals = select_action.q_table[state_key]
        # Map index 1->2 (UP), 2->3 (DOWN), 0->0 (NOOP)
        best_idx = np.argmax(q_vals)
        action = [0, 2, 3][best_idx]
    
    # Store for next update
    select_action.prev_state = state_key
    select_action.prev_action = [0, 2, 3].index(action)
    
    return action

def select_action(obs: np.ndarray) -> int:
    """Select a Pong action from the 128-byte RAM state.

    The player controls the right paddle. A point is scored each time
    the ball passes the opponent's paddle; a point is lost when the
    ball passes the player's own paddle.

    Args:
        obs: 128-element uint8 array (ALE RAM).
            obs[49]: ball x  (17-160, left to right)
            obs[54]: ball y  (17-194, larger = lower on screen)
            obs[51]: player (right) paddle y center (34-194)
            obs[50]: CPU (left) paddle y center     (34-194)
    Returns:
        action: 0 (NOOP), 2 (UP), or 3 (DOWN)
    """
    if not hasattr(select_action, "history"):
        select_action.history = []
    
    ball_x = obs[49]
    ball_y = obs[54]
    paddle_y = obs[51]
    paddle_center = paddle_y + 10
    
    select_action.history.append((ball_x, ball_y))
    if len(select_action.history) > 5:
        select_action.history.pop(0)
    
    # Estimate ball trajectory using linear regression on last 3 points
    if len(select_action.history) >= 3:
        pts = select_action.history[-3:]
        xs = [p[0] for p in pts]
        ys = [p[1] for p in pts]
        n = len(xs)
        sum_x = sum(xs)
        sum_y = sum(ys)
        sum_xy = sum(x * y for x, y in zip(xs, ys))
        sum_xx = sum(x * x for x in xs)
        slope = (n * sum_xy - sum_x * sum_y) / (n * sum_xx - sum_x * sum_x + 1e-6)
        intercept = (sum_y - slope * sum_x) / n
    else:
        slope = 0
        intercept = ball_y
    
    # Predict intercept at x=160 (right edge)
    if slope > 0 and ball_x < 160:
        frames_to_reach = max(1, (160 - ball_x) // 3)
        predicted_y = intercept + slope * 160
        # Handle bounces
        while predicted_y < 17 or predicted_y > 194:
            if predicted_y < 17:
                predicted_y = 34 - predicted_y
            elif predicted_y > 194:
                predicted_y = 194 - (predicted_y - 194)
        error = predicted_y - paddle_center
        # Asymmetric dead zone compensates for paddle momentum
        if error < -5:
            return 2
        elif error > 5:
            return 3
        return 0
    else:
        # Ball moving away or stationary - track current y
        error = ball_y - paddle_center
        if error < -4:
            return 2
        elif error > 4:
            return 3
        return 0

    paddle_y_bucket = int((obs[51] - 34) / 30)  # 0 to 5
    state = (ball_y_bucket, paddle_y_bucket)
    
    # Initialize Q-table and exploration parameters if not present
    if not hasattr(select_action, "Q"):
        select_action.Q = {}
        select_action.epsilon = 0.1
        select_action.alpha = 0.1
        select_action.gamma = 0.9
        select_action.prev_state = None
        select_action.prev_action = None
        select_action.prev_ball_x = obs[49]
        select_action.prev_ball_y = obs[54]
    
    # Store previous ball x for reward detection
    ball_x = obs[49]
    ball_y = obs[54]
    
    # Compute reward when ball passes our paddle x position
    if ball_x >= 155 and select_action.prev_ball_x < 155:
        # Ball reached right side - reward based on alignment
        alignment = abs(ball_y - (obs[51] + 10))
        reward = max(0, 20 - alignment) / 20.0
    else:
        reward = 0
    
    # Update Q-value for previous state-action pair
    if select_action.prev_state is not None and select_action.prev_action is not None:
        if state not in select_action.Q:
            select_action.Q[state] = [0, 0, 0]
        if select_action.prev_state not in select_action.Q:
            select_action.Q[select_action.prev_state] = [0, 0, 0]
        old_q = select_action.Q[select_action.prev_state][select_action.prev_action]
        future_q = max(select_action.Q[state])
        select_action.Q[select_action.prev_state][select_action.prev_action] = old_q + select_action.alpha * (reward + select_action.gamma * future_q - old_q)
    
    # Ensure current state in Q-table
    if state not in select_action.Q:
        select_action.Q[state] = [0, 0, 0]
    
    # Epsilon-greedy action selection
    if np.random.random() < select_action.epsilon:
        action = np.random.choice([0, 2, 3])
    else:
        action = np.argmax(select_action.Q[state])
        # Map argmax index (0,1,2) to actual actions (0,2,3)
        action_map = {0: 0, 1: 2, 2: 3}
        action = action_map[action]
    
    # Update previous state and action
    select_action.prev_state = state
    select_action.prev_action = action
    select_action.prev_ball_x = ball_x
    select_action.prev_ball_y = ball_y
    
    return action

def select_action(obs: np.ndarray) -> int:
    ball_x = int(obs[49])
    ball_y = int(obs[54])
    paddle_y = int(obs[51])
    paddle_center = paddle_y + 10

    # Maintain state across frames
    if not hasattr(select_action, "mode"):
        select_action.mode = "track"
        select_action.prev_ball_y = ball_y
        select_action.overshoot_count = 0

    dy = ball_y - select_action.prev_ball_y
    select_action.prev_ball_y = ball_y

    dist_x = 160 - ball_x

    # Mode switching based on distance and velocity
    if dist_x > 80:
        select_action.mode = "track"
    elif dist_x > 30:
        select_action.mode = "predict"
    else:
        select_action.mode = "evade"

    # Compute target y based on mode
    if select_action.mode == "track":
        target_y = ball_y
    elif select_action.mode == "predict":
        frames = max(1, dist_x // 3)
        target_y = ball_y + dy * frames
        target_y = max(17, min(194, target_y))
    else:  # evade mode - use paddle position to avoid overcorrection
        # Use last known direction with dampening
        if abs(dy) < 2:
            target_y = paddle_center
        else:
            target_y = paddle_center + dy * 2
            target_y = max(34, min(194, target_y))

    # Error calculation with dead zone
    error = target_y - paddle_center
    dead_zone = 5 if select_action.mode != "evade" else 3

    # Anti-overshoot: if changing direction after overshooting, increase dead zone
    if error < -dead_zone and select_action.last_action == 3:
        select_action.overshoot_count += 1
    elif error > dead_zone and select_action.last_action == 2:
        select_action.overshoot_count += 1
    else:
        select_action.overshoot_count = 0

    effective_dead_zone = dead_zone + min(select_action.overshoot_count, 5)

    if error < -effective_dead_zone:
        action = 2  # UP
    elif error > effective_dead_zone:
        action = 3  # DOWN
    else:
        action = 0  # NOOP

    select_action.last_action = action
    return action
